name: Cisco Secure Firewall
description: This app interfaces with Cisco Firepower devices to add, update and delete network objects, network object groups, access policies and access rules

actions.name: List Network Objects
actions.description: List network object in FMC

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Network object name to filter results by

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Network object type to filter results by

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Create Network Object
actions.description: Creates a network object in FMC

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Network object name

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Network object type

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the network object. If type is Range specify value in the following format: ip1-ip2

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Update Network Object
actions.description: Updates a network object in FMC

parameters.name: object_id
parameters.description: Network object id

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Network object name

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Network object type. Note this cannot change and is only used to identify the network object value you'd like to update.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the network object. If type is Range specify value in the following format: ip1-ip2

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Delete Network Object
actions.description: Deletes a network object in FMC

parameters.name: object_id
parameters.description: Network object id

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Network object type

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Get Network Group Objects
actions.description: Gets all network group objects in FMC host or a specfic network group

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Group name to retrieve from FMC

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Create Network Group Object
actions.description: Create a network group object

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the network group

parameters.name: network_object_ids
parameters.description: Network objects attached to the group. Note these ids must already exist in FMC

parameters.name: overridable
parameters.description: Changes to this won't affect parent policies or configurations

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Update Network Group Object
actions.description: Update a network group object

parameters.name: network_group_id
parameters.description: Network group to update

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the network group

parameters.name: network_object_ids_to_add
parameters.description: Network objects to add to the group. Note these ids must already exist in FMC

parameters.name: network_object_ids_to_remove
parameters.description: Network objects to remove from the group.

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Delete Network Group Object
actions.description: Delete a network group object

parameters.name: network_group_id
parameters.description: Network group to update

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Get Access Control Policies
actions.description: Gets all or a particular access control policy in the FMC host for a particular domain

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Id of the policy to retrieve

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Create Access Control Policy
actions.description: Create an access control policy

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the network group

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the policy

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of action to take on matching traffic

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Update Access Control Policy
actions.description: Update an access control policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Id of the policy to update

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the policy

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the policy

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of action to take on matching traffic

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Delete Access Control Policies
actions.description: Deletes the specified access control policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Id of the policy to delete

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Get Access Control Rules
actions.description: Gets all access control rules associated with a particular access control policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Access control policy that the rule is apart of

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Id of the rules

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Create Access Control Rule
actions.description: Creates an access control rule associated with a particular access control policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Access control policy the rule will be apart of

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the access control rule

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of action to take on matching traffic

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Wether the rule is enabled

parameters.name: source_networks
parameters.description: Network groups or objects to determine what action to take against traffic based on where it originated from

parameters.name: destination_networks
parameters.description: Network groups or objects to determine what action to take against traffic based on its intended destination

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Update Access Control Rule
actions.description: Updates an access control rule associated with a particular access control policy

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Access control rule to update

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Access control policy that the rule is apart of

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the access control rule

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of action to take on matching traffic

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Wether the rule is enabled

parameters.name: source_networks_to_add
parameters.description: Add these network groups or objects to the rules source networks

parameters.name: source_networks_to_remove
parameters.description: Remove these network groups or objects from the rules source networks

parameters.name: destination_networks_to_add
parameters.description: Add these network groups or objects to the rules destination networks

parameters.name: destination_networks_to_remove
parameters.description: Remove these network groups or objects from the rules destination networks

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Delete Access Control Rules
actions.description: Deletes access control rule associated with a particular access control policy

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Access control rule to delete

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Access control policy that the rule is apart of

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: List Intrusion Policies
actions.description: Gets all intrusion polcies in the FMC host for a particular domain

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Intrusion policy to retrieve

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Create Intrusion Policy
actions.description: Create an intrusion policy

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the intrusion policy

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the intrusion policy

parameters.name: base_policy
parameters.description: Base intrusion policy ID. Can be found using list intrusion policies

parameters.name: inspection_mode
parameters.description: The inspection mode for the Snort 3 engine

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Update Intrusion Policy
actions.description: Update an intrusion policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Id of the intrusion policy to update

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the policy

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the policy

parameters.name: base_policy
parameters.description: Base intrusion policy ID. Can be found using list intrusion policies

parameters.name: inspection_mode
parameters.description: The inspection mode for the Snort 3 engine

parameters.name: replicate_inspection_mode
parameters.description: Whether to replicate inspection_mode from Snort 3 to Snort

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Delete Intrusion Policy
actions.description: Deletes the specified access intrusion policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Id of the policy to delete

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: List Devices
actions.description: Lists all devices belonging to a particular domain/tenant

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Get Deployable Devices
actions.description: List all devices with configuration chnges that are ready to be deployed

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Deploy Devices
actions.description: Deploy devices that are ready to deploy

parameters.name: devices
parameters.description: Device IDs of devices to deploy changes to. If left empty all devices with configuration changes will deploy

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried

actions.name: Get Deployment Status
actions.description: Get status of a deployment

parameters.name: deployment_id
parameters.description: Id of the deployment

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: Firepower Domain. If none is specified the default domain will be queried
